content: In the MDOlab at the University of Michigan I work to leverage gradient based optimization methods for aerodynamic and heat transfer problems. I made this website to share knowledge through blog posts and my research.
summary: In the MDOlab at the University of Michigan I work to leverage gradient based optimization methods for aerodynamic and heat transfer problems. I made this website to share knowledge through blog posts and my research.
title: Josh Anibal

content: Click the Cite button above to demo the feature to enable visitors to import publication metadata into their reference management software.    Click the Slides button above to demo Academic’s Markdown slides feature.   Supplementary notes can be added here, including code and math.
summary: The shape of the X-57 high-lift motors are modified to reduce drag for a range of heat constraints evaluated with a convective or conjugate heat transfer model.
title: Aerothermal Optimization of X-57 High-Lift Motor Nacelle
